project.name: BIM Data Quality Engineering & AI Analysis PoC
project.purpose: Prepare BIM quality check results as structured context for generative AI usage.
project.note: This context is generated for PoC purposes. It is not a production AI system.

rule_summary.RuleName: 必須パラメータ未入力
ファミリ命名規則違反

limitations: QualityScore is a simple PoC metric, not an official business quality standard.
FixPriority is a provisional label, not a verified business ground truth.
The generated context is intended to support human review, not automate BIM model correction.
Revit API and pyRevit integration are not implemented in this stage.

violations.rule_name: 必須パラメータ未入力
violations.fix_guide: 該当要素に必要な BIM_ModelRole または BIM_Zone を入力する

violations.fix_guide: 該当要素に必要な BIM_ModelRole または BIM_Zone を入力する

violations.rule_name: 分類コード未入力
violations.fix_guide: 分類コード表に従い、BIM_ClassificationCode を入力する

violations.rule_name: ファミリ命名規則違反
violations.fix_guide: 命名規則に従い、カテゴリ・用途・識別情報が分かるファミリ名へ修正する

ai_instruction.task: Explain detected BIM data quality issues and suggest human-review-oriented fix actions.
constraints: Do not assume information that is not included in the context.
Do not claim that the model can be automatically fixed.
Use RuleId, Severity, FixGuide, QualityScore, and FixPriority as the primary reference information.
Explain that final design or model correction decisions should be made by a human reviewer.
